title: Inject tool descriptions into agent prompt (composeAgentPrompt upgrade)
context_files: src/lib/interpreter/promptComposer.ts (composeAgentPrompt from subtask 04; add tool descriptions section)
acceptance_criteria: composeAgentPrompt accepts optional toolDescriptions: string parameter
When toolDescriptions provided, appends 'AVAILABLE TOOLS:' section to system prompt
Tool descriptions instruct LLM to reference tool names in step planning
LLM instructed to output steps with tool: 'translate', 'remember', 'recall' where applicable
composeAgentPrompt works without toolDescriptions (backward compatible with Phase B)
